creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Brian from comment #11)

All I have is basic reproducibility information. I've no clue why
the "mmcsd0: Error indicated: 1 Timeout"s happen when it has less
RAM available.

A possibility is that other total_mem value assignments that are
smaller than what the 2 GiByte RPi4b gets by default might
happen to avoid the problem via causing a different memory layout.
But that is just a guess.

Note: I do not know the detailed value that a 2 GiByte RPi4B gets
for total_mem by default.
